steps.title: Infer the needed attitude
steps.content: Drivers who already think the bridge toll is too high would probably resist a proposal to raise it. The blank needs a phrase meaning open to or willing to consider.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant meanings
steps.content: B means informed about, C means angered by, and D means referenced in. The sentence says those drivers are unlikely to be open to a higher toll. The answer is A.
